attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.DOCUMENT_ID, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.SEQ_NUM, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ENTITY_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.PK1_VALUE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.PK2_VALUE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.PK3_VALUE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.PK4_VALUE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.PK5_VALUE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.AUTOMATICALLY_ADDED_FLAG, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.COLUMN1, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.APP_SOURCE_VERSION, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.CATEGORY_ID, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.STATUS, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN,
 (
 select ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN
 minus
 select ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID = STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMEN.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_FND_ATTACHED_DOCUMENTS)
